description: A vertical graphic on an orange textured background. A black banner at the top holds orange text reading ARRESTED, BY ICE PHILADELPHIA ON FEB. 13, 2025. The center shows a framed booking-style photograph of a man with short dark hair, facing the camera against a gray wall. Below, black banners hold orange text reading CHILD PORNOGRAPHY. A small White House logo and WH.GOV appear at the bottom.
notable_text: ARRESTED; BY ICE PHILADELPHIA ON FEB. 13, 2025; CHILD PORNOGRAPHY; WH.GOV
